site.name: The Long Ball
site.tagline: Digging the data behind the distance.

description: Pitcher-facing longball damage allowed leaderboard for The Hot Dog Stand.
sourceNotes: Uses the canonical Statcast pitch cache and Baseball Savant Home Run Tracker Adjusted mode. The frontend reads this precomputed static JSON and never queries Statcast directly.

fields.team: Pitcher's team when reliably available; otherwise an em dash.
fields.hotDogIndex: HDI v1.1 plus-style pitcher score for total longball damage allowed.
fields.hdiVersion: Hot Dog Index formula version used for this pitcher row.
fields.cookedPer100Bbe: Hot Dog damage allowed per 100 batted balls in play.
fields.totalBbeAllowed: Total batted-ball events allowed in the cached Statcast sample.
fields.hrCapableBbeAllowed: Batted balls allowed that Baseball Savant classifies as having home-run potential in at least one MLB park.
fields.hrWindowThunderBbeAllowed: Batted balls allowed at 105 mph or harder with launch angle between 25 and 40 degrees.
fields.hrWindowThunderRateAllowed: Share of BBE allowed at 105 mph or harder with launch angle between 25 and 40 degrees. HDI v1.1 component.
fields.noDoubtersAllowed: HR-capable batted balls allowed that would clear all 30 MLB parks.
fields.mostlyGoneAllowed: HR-capable batted balls allowed that would clear many parks, but not all.
fields.doubtersAllowed: HR-capable batted balls allowed that would clear only a small number of parks.
fields.avgExitVelocityAllowed: Average exit velocity allowed on HR-capable contact when available.
fields.avgDistanceAllowed: Average projected distance allowed on HR-capable contact when available. Reference stat only, not part of HDI v1.1.
fields.meatballPitchesThrown: Heart-zone pitches below the pitcher's 25th-percentile velocity for that pitch type, with the pitch-type sample safeguard applied.

source.methodology: HDI v1.1 measures pitcher-side longball damage allowed, anchored by Adjusted xHR/BBE allowed and sharpened by HR-capable contact, no-doubters, Avg EV allowed, and HR-Window Thunder Allowed. A meatball is a Heart-zone pitch thrown below the pitcher's 25th-percentile velocity for that pitch type, with a 15+ pitch sample for that pitch type. The Hot Dog Stand identifies pitchers who have served up the most damage on these mistakes.
